name: @comma/core-strategies
description: Official Build, Plan, QA, maintenance, and conversation strategies for CommaAgents.

build.description: Plan, implement, and verify a requested code change.

plan.description: Investigate a task and produce a reviewed implementation plan.

qa.description: Review a change set and report evidence-backed findings.

reduce-complexity.description: Identify and reduce unnecessary implementation complexity.

talk.description: Answer questions with optional codebase and web investigation.

standardize.description: Coordinate standards-driven updates across a project.

standardize-worker.description: Internal worker used by the Standardize manager.
